title: Creamy Chinese Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Asian-inspired stir fry with a creamy twist. Serve over rice or noodles for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or canola oil

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cook until tender but still crisp, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the chickpeas, creamy stir-fry sauce, and flour.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
